effect: • +75% to the effects of Random Affixes on this Prism

• Adds an additional effect to the Core Talent on the God of Might/Goddess of Hunting/Goddess of Knowledge/God of War/Goddess of Deception/God of Machines Advanced Talent Panel:

• Adds an additional effect to the Core Talent on the God of Might/Goddess of Hunting/Goddess of Knowledge/God of War/Goddess of Deception/God of Machines Advanced Talent Panel:
